details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 30-min beginner piano trial Thurs after 5pm with 4.5+ teacher rating
Task 2: Choose cheaper 60-min, 4x/month private package between violin and cello under $260 and add to cart
Task 3: Enroll two siblings in back-to-back 45-min weekly piano and guitar lessons on same day
Task 4: Purchase 4 drop-in Saturday drum lessons before 2pm with total price under $180
Task 5: Register for beginner group class starting next month, weekday evening, max 6 students, 1 seat
Task 6: Buy $100 digital gift card for any lessons with scheduled email delivery on 20th of next month
Task 7: Apply guitar-specific promo code to 60-min guitar lesson package over $100
Task 8: Reschedule 30-min voice lesson from Monday 3pm to Wed-Fri between 4pm-7pm with same teacher
Task 9: Submit contact form inquiry for studio rental Saturdays 1-3pm for 6 weeks
